response:
1. area of zen garden = πr²  
area for dining = 2 × πr²  
total area of dining room = 20 × 15 = 300 m²  
area for dining = 300 − πr²  
set 300 − πr² = 2πr²  
300 = 3πr²  
r² = 300 / (3π) = 100 / π  
r = √(100 / π) ≈ 5.64 m  

2. radius of fountain = r / 3 ≈ 1.88 m  
surface area of cylinder (excluding base) = 2πrh = 2π × 1.88 × 1.5 ≈ 17.8 m²  
cost = 17.8 × 50 = 890  

r  
890
